design_philosophy.core_vibe: Approachable, organized, high-energy, with a stark technical underbelly.
e1_principles: Neo-Brutalist contrast: Soft pastels with hard 2px black borders and harsh drop shadows.
The Terminal Twist: The 'Agent Activity Monitor' uses a stark retro-futurist terminal look (black bg, mono font, neon green/mint text) to contrast the playful pastel dashboard.
Typography Hierarchy: Bold 'Work Sans' for headings, legible 'IBM Plex Sans' for body, and 'IBM Plex Mono' for agent logs and metadata.
Generous padding inside bordered containers to avoid text collisions.

headings.usage_rules: Use tracking-tight for all headings. Never center unless explicitly needed for layout balance.

monospace.usage_rules: Strictly use for Agent Activity Logs, technical data, timestamps, and overline tags.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid (Mode B) tailored for Neo-Brutalism. Strict gaps, no jagged edges.
spacing_and_layout.padding: Containers must use p-6 or p-8. No cramped text against borders.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max rounded-md for slight softening. Keep edges mostly sharp.

surface_strategies.cards: bg-[#FAFAFA] border-2 border-[#050505] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(5,5,5,1)] transition-transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_rgba(5,5,5,1)]
surface_strategies.buttons_primary: bg-[#FDE047] text-[#050505] border-2 border-[#050505] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(5,5,5,1)] hover:bg-[#FACC15] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(5,5,5,1)] active:translate-y-[4px] active:translate-x-[4px] active:shadow-none transition-all font-bold
surface_strategies.buttons_secondary: bg-[#C4B5FD] text-[#050505] border-2 border-[#050505] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(5,5,5,1)] hover:bg-[#A78BFA] hover:translate-y-[2px] hover:translate-x-[2px] hover:shadow-[2px_2px_0px_0px_rgba(5,5,5,1)] transition-all font-bold
surface_strategies.terminal_panel: bg-[#050505] text-[#A7F3D0] border-2 border-[#050505] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(167,243,208,1)] p-6 font-mono overflow-y-auto
surface_strategies.inputs: bg-[#FAFAFA] border-2 border-[#050505] focus:ring-0 focus:outline-none focus:bg-[#FEF9C3] transition-colors rounded-none

components.navigation: Sidebar with hard right border. Active links should have a background block of #C4B5FD with a 2px black border and shadow.
components.agent_chat: Chat bubbles should be stark boxes. User: bg-[#FDE047]. Agent: bg-[#FAFAFA]. Both with hard borders.
components.task_manager: List items with custom thick black border checkboxes. Strikethrough text for completed items, with muted opacity.
components.calendar_view: Grid with thick black borders (border-collapse style). Today highlighted in #A7F3D0.

images.description: Minimalist vector illustration of a checklist and calendar, neo-brutalist style. Use for empty task lists or welcome screen.
Cute robot head mascot in pastel and thick black outlines. Use in the AI chat header or Agent Activity Monitor.
Abstract pastel shapes. Can be used as a subtle header background pattern (with opacity).
Abstract geometric pastel shapes. Good for auth screen or decorative side panels.

icons: lucide-react, but set strokeWidth={2.5} to match the thick, brutalist borders.
testing: All interactive elements must include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='add-task-button', data-testid='agent-chat-input').
instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup font imports for 'Work Sans', 'IBM Plex Sans', and 'IBM Plex Mono' in index.html or use Google Fonts link in CSS.
2. STRICTLY follow the Neo-Brutalist shadow pattern (box-shadow with hard black offset, NO blur).
3. Use standard HTML/Tailwind for main layouts instead of rigid Shadcn components if they conflict with the bold borders. Customizing pure divs is easier for the Neo-Brutalist look.
4. For the 'Agent Activity Monitor', make it look like a stark, retro terminal (black bg, mint green mono text) floating inside the pastel dashboard. Use drop-shadows with mint green.
5. Ensure deep contrast for all text. No light gray text on white. Use #050505 or #4B5563 minimum.
6. Apply empty state images and mascot exactly where specified.
